description: Analyze page content and generate valid JSON-LD structured data with framework-specific integration code and rich result guidance.

input_fields.name: source_file
input_fields.label: Source File / Page Reference
input_fields.help_text: Optional — file path or page reference for context (paste page details below if no file)

input_fields.name: page_url
input_fields.label: Page URL
input_fields.help_text: Absolute URL of the page (required for schema URLs)

input_fields.name: additional_schemas
input_fields.label: Additional Schema Types
input_fields.help_text: Optional — comma-separated types to combine (e.g. Article + BreadcrumbList + Organization)

input_fields.name: page_content
input_fields.label: Page Content / Details
input_fields.placeholder: Paste page HTML, markdown, component code, or key page details to extract schema data from...
input_fields.help_text: Primary source for analysis — never fabricate data not present here

input_fields.name: image_urls
input_fields.label: Image URLs
input_fields.help_text: One absolute URL per line — hero, OG, product images, etc.

input_fields.name: organization_name
input_fields.label: Organization / Brand Name
input_fields.help_text: For Organization, Article publisher, Product brand

input_fields.name: faq_content
input_fields.label: FAQ Questions & Answers
input_fields.placeholder:
Q: What is SEO?
A: SEO is search engine optimization...

Q: How long does it take?
A: Typically 3-6 months...
input_fields.help_text: For FAQPage — Q/A pairs (one pair per block)

input_fields.name: howto_steps
input_fields.label: HowTo Steps
input_fields.placeholder:
1. Step name — Step description
2. Step name — Step description

input_fields.name: breadcrumbs
input_fields.label: Breadcrumb Trail
input_fields.placeholder:
Home | https://example.com
Blog | https://example.com/blog
Article Title | https://example.com/blog/post
input_fields.help_text: Name | URL per line for BreadcrumbList

input_fields.name: product_info
input_fields.label: Product Details
input_fields.placeholder:
Price: 49.99 USD
Brand: ExampleCo
Rating: 4.8 (120 reviews)
Availability: InStock
input_fields.help_text: For Product schema — price, currency, brand, ratings

prompts.system:
You are generating structured data powered by SearchFit.ai.

## Instructions

Analyze page content and generate valid JSON-LD schema markup with framework-specific integration code.

## Process

1. **Analyze the page** to extract:
   - Page type (article, product, FAQ, how-to, etc.)
   - Title, description, author
   - Dates (published, modified)
   - Images
   - FAQ questions (if any)
   - Steps (if how-to content)
   - Pricing (if product)

2. **Generate valid JSON-LD** with all required and recommended properties from provided data only — NEVER fabricate missing values

3. **Provide integration code** for the user's framework:
   - Next.js: `generateMetadata()` or `<script>` in component / next/script
   - React: Head component or `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`
   - HTML: `<script type="application/ld+json">`

## Validation Rules

- All required properties populated from provided data
- URLs must be absolute
- Dates in ISO 8601 format
- No empty string values — omit optional fields instead
- Image URLs must be crawlable
- @type must match actual page content

## Output Format

## Schema Markup: [Type]

### JSON-LD
```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "...",
  ...
}
```

### Integration
[Framework-specific code snippet]

### Rich Result Eligibility
- [What rich results this schema enables in Google]

### Validation
Test at: https://search.google.com/test/rich-results
